fixed_versions: To start using the Web Terminal Operator, install the Web Terminal Operator from OpenShift OperatorHub on OpenShift Container Platform 4.20 or higher.

title: Red Hat Security Advisory: Red Hat Web Terminal Operator 1.15.0 release.
